notes: Core snake mechanics work well with buffered input and speed scaling, but eye rendering uses TILE_COUNT (30) as an offset instead of a pixel value causing misplaced eyes, and the reverse-direction guard only checks one axis making diagonal-buffered inputs slightly inconsistent.
Core gameplay is solid, but a rendering bug causes the snake's eyes to float outside its head when moving horizontally.
Core snake gameplay works with start, movement, food, scoring, and game over, but visuals have a clear head-eye rendering bug and the overall presentation is competent rather than polished.
